message:
refactor(web): Lift service worker state to Providers component

Move useServiceWorker() call from OfflineBanner to Providers and pass
isOffline/isRegistered as props. This makes OfflineBanner more reusable
and avoids duplicate hook calls since Providers already manages
service worker registration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
